title: Audit Senior
description:
Job Highlights

· Friendly and caring colleagues and managers

· Proximity to MRT stations

· Good starting salary with annual increment and bonus

· Good benefits and working environment

· Good career progression

· 5 days work week

· Friendly culture, understanding management, open concept office

· Opportunities for quality learning and experience

· Offers challenging career and great career opportunities ahead

· Opportunities to travel overseas for work after traveling restrictions are relaxed


Responsibilities

· Perform statutory and special audits (fieldwork, documentation of results)

· Prepare audited financial statements in accordance with SFRS

· Prepare tax computations in accordance with the Singapore Income Tax Act

· Assist to prepare an audit plan for an external audit

· Support Manager in audit planning, fieldwork, and audit reporting; prepare reports and communicate findings and recommendations to clients

· Perform internal control reviews and special purpose auditing projects

· Effectively communicate any audit issues in a timely and organised manner

· Assist in completing any other assigned tasks

· Undertake specific stages of audit work under supervision by Audit Senior and Manager

· Assist to evaluate the audit evidence obtained and perform audit procedures to meet the objectives of external audit engagements

· Assist Manager in the planning, execution and finalization of all areas of audit for SMEs and listed entities


Requirements

· Partial ACCA or degree holder.

· 3 to 4 years' relevant experience is preferred for audit senior

· Diploma, Advanced/Higher/Graduate Diploma

· Minimum of Diploma in Accountancy and working towards ACCA or Bachelor's Degree in Accountancy or related field

· Proficiency in Microsoft Office software programs such as MS Word, MS Excel and Office 365

· Professionalism, dependability, integrity and trustworthiness combined with a cooperative attitude

· Highly motivated self-starter with ability to multi-task and complete assignments within time constraints and deadlines

Interested candidates are invited to apply online


Only shortlisted candidates will be notified. Thank you for applying.

postedCompany.description:
Enrome in Singapore is an accountancy practices firm that provides assurance, tax and advisory advice to the Singapore and globally organisations.

​

We have a team of dedicated professionals with wealth of experience to provide a full range of assurance, tax and advisory services to help clients in private sector across a variety of industries to navigate the ever changing dynamics of the business and regulatory environments in the domestic as well as global markets.
postedCompany.name: ENROME LLP

districts.location: D01 Cecil, Marina, People’s Park, Raffles Place
